description: Included are files uploaded by Pekka Eric Auvinen to his YouTube account and from a "Media Pack" uploaded shortly before the shooting to RapidShare, along with screenshots of his online accounts. Also included is a report of the shooting released by Police in 2008 in both Finnish and English, as well as a video reconstruction of the shooting. Files found at : http://misc.nybergh.net/pub/jokela/
